zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Burgh於1226年出生在愛爾蘭康瑙特時，她的父親Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught33歲，母親Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught26歲。她於1242年與Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland在英國史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年3月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加卡納達-斯特萊音斯特拉陳亞基爾堅尼享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Burgh于1226年出生在爱尔兰康瑙特时，她的父亲Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught33岁，母亲Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught26岁。她于1242年与Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland在英国史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年3月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加卡納達-斯特萊音斯特拉陳亞基爾堅尼享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Burgh was born in 1226, in Connaught, Ireland, her father, Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught, was 33 and her mother, Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, was 26. She married Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland in 1242, in Wem, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 March 1252, in Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada East, British Colonial America, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Burgh est née en 1226, à Connaught, Irlande, son père, Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland en 1242, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1252, à Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.Kilkenny, Leinster, Ireland: Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Burgh 1226 in Connaught, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught 33 und ihre Mutter Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught 26. Sie hat 1242 in Wem, Shropshire, England Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. März 1252 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Burgh è nata il nel 1226 nel Connaught, Irlanda, sua padre, Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland nel 1242, nel Wem, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 marzo 1252, nel Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, British Colonial America, all'età di 26 anni.

ko.Kilkenny, Leinster, Ireland: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다-스트 레인스터 러천아이 킬켄이
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Burgh(이)가 1226년 아일랜드 콘오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 캔아다-스트 레인스터 러천아이 킬켄이에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Burgh nasceu em 1226, em Connaught, Irlanda, seu pai, Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland em 1242, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de março de 1252, em Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, British Colonial America, com 26 anos.

ru.Kilkenny, Leinster, Ireland: килкенни, лачэнеи, линстир, канада-ест, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Burgh родилась в 1226 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland в 1242 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 марта 1252 г. в местности килкенни, лачэнеи, линстир, канада-ест, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Burgh nació en 1226, en Connaught, Irlanda, su papá, Richard Mór De Burgh 1st Baron of Connaught, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Egidia de Lacy Lady of Connaught, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Theobald Butler 3rd Chief Butler of Ireland en 1242, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1252, en Kilkenny, Lachenaie, Leinster, Canada-Est, British Colonial America, a la edad de 26 años.
